creator: robbak@gmail.com
text:
Thank you for this. 

There is a reason why I have not updated this port is that, in my opinion, and putting a nice fine point on it, the actions of bitcoin-core over the last months have been actively malicious. 

It is my opinion that this port should switch to some other repo. However, -unlimited seems poorly managed, -xt is too broad. My current choice is -classic, when they tag a stable release.

So, as to this - should I approve it? The more I think of it, the more I answer no, mostly because it includes the RBF stuff that should never have been committed.

Comments welcome.
